title: asplenium manilense
intro: Asplenium manilense, also known as the Manilense or Philippine spleenwort, is a species of fern that is native to the Philippines. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Asplenium manilense include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential use in wound healing and as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used topically as a poultice or salve.
